function y(y)return a[y+(204856-161889)]end for y,d in ipairs({{-1033526+1033527,430836-430478};{-954121-(-954122);582876-582757};{-673448+673568;-573706+574064}})do while end do local y=table.concat local d=a local C=string.len local
